brief_justification: Paper A derives astrophysical constraints on the primordial-black-hole dark-matter fraction by computing Hawking-radiation photon spectra (with spin) and integrating them over five dark-matter halo density profiles to bound dust heating; Paper B is a numerical-software contribution that accelerates a stiff-ODE solver (G-Scheme) for combustion chemistry via a multi-resolution hash-table lookup of Jacobian-eigensystem kernel sets. There is no shared transferable machinery — one is a radiative/statistical constraint calculation, the other an ODE-integration/table-lookup optimization — so no role-for-role mapping holds.
